chapter_context.summary: Uzziah reigns gloriously, developing military engines and agriculture; he proudly enters the Temple sanctuary to burn incense and becomes a leper.

outline.text: Uzziah Reigns Well; Invents War Engines; Farms Flourish
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Uzziah Reigns Well; Invents War Engines; Farms Flourish (26:1-15), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

outline.text: Uzziah Grows Proud; Enters Sanctuary to Burn Incense; Smitten with Leprosy
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Uzziah Grows Proud; Enters Sanctuary to Burn Incense; Smitten with Leprosy (26:16-23), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of 2 Chronicles.

key_themes.title: The Temple Centered Kingdom
key_themes.description: The presence of God's glory in the Temple is the absolute center of national blessing and life.

key_themes.title: Immediate Retribution and Reform
key_themes.description: Good kings who seek the LORD experience immediate victory and peace, while unfaithfulness leads to immediate warning and exile.

devotional.question: How do the events of Chapter 26 prompt you to humble yourself, seek God's face, and turn away from compromise?
What practical reforms can you make in your daily walk to ensure your heart is dedicated to God?

cultural_historical.title: The Levitical Worship System
cultural_historical.text: Unlike the Book of Kings, Chronicles highlights the roles of singers, Levites, and liturgical musicians in the temple's daily administration.
